creator: t.m.guymer@thomasguymer.co.uk
text: Hmm, OK, that's odd. I have never had any errors returned by "pkg check --dependencies" for the nVidia drivers before: it is only since upgrading to FreeBSD 14.2 that it is now showing missing dependencies. Maybe it's a red herring, but I don't think it is good that it is trying to access libraries that don't exist.
